A.detail: no right-click context menu with Truncate on assistant blocks. ccsm implements Truncate only on USER blocks via hover-icon (Scissors), not right-click on assistant. Spec divergence.

B-truncate.detail: messages cut from 6 -> 3, last block is the truncated-at user message (kept per Bug #309).

B.detail: new prompt continued after truncate. Final block count 5.

C-rightclick.detail: no right-click context menu on user. ccsm uses inline hover icons (Pencil=Edit, RotateCw=Retry, Copy, Scissors=Truncate). Spec divergence.

C.detail: Edit loaded original text into composer; modified+send appended a NEW user turn (non-destructive — does NOT replace). This matches ccsm intentional design but DIVERGES from fp9 spec ("replace original turn AND everything after").

D.detail: Edit-and-resend in ccsm APPENDS a new turn. The agent sees BOTH the original AND the edited prompt in history. Spec said it should REPLACE.

E.detail: Edit on first user message exercised in Check C — same code path. Result inherited.

F.detail: marker persisted but post-restart message count grew unexpectedly: 3 -> 10. May indicate JSONL re-hydration didn't apply marker correctly.
